title: Doctor at Sea
writer: Richard Gordon, Nicholas Phipps, Jack Davies
actors: Dirk Bogarde, Brenda de Banzie, Brigitte Bardot
plot: Bachelor Dr. Simon Sparrow (Dirk Bogarde) goes to sea to escape his mentor's amorous daughter, but ends up in more trouble wrangling the captain, crew, and Brigitte Bardot.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 nominations total
